creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Sun, Mar 11, 2007 at 07:46:07AM +0000, Dave Woodruff wrote:
> Makefile error: you need to define PORTNAME and PORTVERSION instead of PKGNAME.
> (This port is too old for your bsd.port.mk, please update it to match
>  your bsd.port.mk.)
> *** Error code 1

Can you do a "grep FreeBSD /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk | head" and
send me the output?

If it is older than 10 days, cvsup (or portsnap) first and try again.

Edwin
